title.en: List of groups of products without an intended medical purpose referred to in Article 1(2)
title.zh: 第1条第2款所述的无预期医疗目的的产品组清单

standards.abstract: Lists 6 groups of products without an intended medical purpose that fall under EU MDR scope: contact lenses, implants for aesthetic purposes, substances for facial/dermal filling, equipment for liposuction/lipodissolving, high-intensity EM radiation equipment, equipment for brain stimulation.
standards.scope: Regulatory framework for Annex XVI products (aesthetic devices, non-medical contact lenses, dermal fillers, etc.).

title.en: Common specifications for products without an intended medical purpose listed in Annex XVI to MDR
title.zh: MDR附录XVI中列出的无预期医疗目的产品的通用规范

standards.abstract: Establishes common specifications laying down detailed requirements for groups of products listed in Annex XVI of the MDR. Covers safety, performance, risk management and clinical evaluation requirements for non-medical purpose products.
standards.scope: Common specifications for Annex XVI products including aesthetic implants, dermal fillers, colored contact lenses, and body contouring equipment.

title.en: Ophthalmic optics - Spectacle lenses - Fundamental requirements for uncut finished lenses
title.zh: 眼科光学 - 眼镜片 - 未切割成品镜片的基本要求

standards.abstract: Specifies fundamental requirements for uncut finished spectacle lenses. Applicable to colored and decorative contact lenses under Annex XVI when used without corrective purpose. Edition 3.
standards.scope: Spectacle lenses requirements, applicable by reference to non-corrective colored contact lenses.

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 1: Requirements and general principles for the evaluation of biological safety within a risk management process
title.zh: 医疗器械生物学评价 - 第1部分：风险管理过程中生物安全评价的要求和通用原则

standards.abstract: Cornerstone standard for biological evaluation. Edition 6, completely reorganized to align with ISO 14971. Critical for Annex XVI products involving body contact (dermal fillers, implants).
standards.scope: Biological safety evaluation framework for all medical devices and Annex XVI products with body contact.
standards.note: Essential for dermal fillers, breast implants, and aesthetic implants under Annex XVI.

title.en: Clinical investigation of medical devices for human subjects - Good clinical practice
title.zh: 人体医疗器械临床研究 - 良好临床实践

standards.abstract: Specifies good clinical practice for design, conduct, recording and reporting of clinical investigations. Amendment 1 published 2024. Required for Annex XVI products clinical evidence.
standards.scope: Good clinical practice for clinical investigations of medical devices and Annex XVI products.
